name: test_trav_22_add_and_remove_rooms_from_cart
statusMessage: AssertionError: Expected 8 rooms, but found 9 rooms!
statusTrace:
browser = <selenium.webdriver.chrome.webdriver.WebDriver (session="7143874a056c06a4f136c4d9416ba96f")>
config = <tests.environment_config.ProductionConfig object at 0x7f5076786650>

    @pytest.mark.production
    @pytest.mark.staging
    def test_trav_22_add_and_remove_rooms_from_cart(browser, config):
        search_hotel = SearchHotelPage(browser)
        chart_page = ChartPage(browser)
    
    
        # Cauta o rezervare din Quick Search si click pe butonul "Adauga in cos"
        search_hotel.search_ahead("Mamaia", 5)
        pozitie, nr_camere_initial = search_hotel.gaseste_prima_pozitie_valida()
        search_hotel.click_adauga_in_cos(pozitie)
    
        # Camera este adaugata in cos pe butonul de Camere in cos apare -> 1,
        chart_page.check_number_of_rooms_box(1)
    
        # dupa click optiunile de Rezerva acum si Ofertare sunt disponibile
        chart_page.open_chart()
        chart_page.check_rezerva_acum_button()
        chart_page.check_ofertare_button()
    
        # Disponibilitatea camerelor a scazut cu o valoare dupa ce camera a fost adaugata in cos
        search_hotel.assert_allotment_single_room(nr_camere_initial-1)
    
        # Mai adauga o camera in cos
        search_hotel.click_adauga_in_cos_single_room()
    
        # Camera a fost adaugata in cos, in cos sunt disponibile doua camere,
        chart_page.check_number_of_rooms_box(2)
    
        # iar disponibilitatea camerelor a scazut cu o valoare
        search_hotel.assert_allotment_single_room(nr_camere_initial - 2)
    
        # Sterge o camera din cosul de cumparaturi
        chart_page.delete_room()
    
        # Camera a fost stearsa din cosul de cumparaturi,
        chart_page.check_number_of_rooms_box(1)
    
        # iar disponibilitatea camerelor a crescut cu o valoare
>       search_hotel.assert_allotment_single_room(nr_camere_initial - 1)

    def assert_allotment_single_room(self, expected_no):
        self.base_page.wait_for_element_to_appear(*self.AVAILABLE_ROOM_X, timeout=10)
        actual_no = int(self.driver.find_element(*self.AVAILABLE_ROOM_X).text)
>       assert actual_no == expected_no, f"Expected {expected_no} rooms, but found {actual_no} rooms!"
